DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFFS KATHLEEN DARLING, TODD DARLING'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFFS' FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $625, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts' Responses To Form Interrogatorie (Set One) And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One)
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Derek Stafford, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Kathleen Darling
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFFS KATHLEEN DARLING, TODD DARLING'S Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) is granted. Defendants are ordered to respond to Plaintiffs' Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) within 20 days of notice of this order. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $625, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
